title: carduus hamulosus subsp. stenocephalus
intro: Carduus hamulosus subsp. stenocephalus, also known as a subspecies of the Thistle plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Carduus hamulosus subsp. stenocephalus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
